prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-COOKTOOLS-PARENT-GREY Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Dark Grey Nylon Wooden Kitchen Utensils Cooking Spoons, Soup Ladle, Skimmer Spoon, Spatula Description: Upgrade your kitchen with this versatile five piece nylon and wood kitchen utensils set from Beille, thoughtfully designed to handle all your cooking needs with ease and style. This kitchen utensils set is perfect for everyday use, combining functionality and durability with a modern aesthetic. The collection includes a slotted spoon, a solid spoon, a soup ladle, a skimmer spoon and solid spatula.

The kitchen utensils set have been designed with sturdy handles made of wood, so you can count on them to last. The ergonomic handle design with top rubber soft grip will provide comfort when in use and help prevent against slippage giving you maximum control when tackling your favorite recipes. The handles also come with built in slots for hanging storage if preferred.

Made from tough and durable nylon, these kitchen utensils can withstand high heat cooking temperatures, that will stand up to all the wear and tear your kitchen can dish out! The durable nylon construction ensures strength and flexibility when cooking in the kitchen. The kitchen utensils set feature a stylish wood and charcoal grey finish, that will easily go with existing kitchen decor.

Durable, easy to clean and safe for non stick cookware, these utensils are a must have for any culinary enthusiast. With the Beille nylon kitchen utensils set, you can cook, bake, serve and food prep in comfort and style for many meals to come! Search Terms: (none) Features: - 5PC KITCHEN UTENSILS SET: Five piece kitchen utensils set includes a solid spoon, slotted spoon, skimmer spoon, soup ladle and solid spatula, making it a great kitchen starter set and reliable kitchen essentials for food and meal prep, baking, cooking and more === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
